projects.title: Brevian - Sales Intelligence Platform
projects.description: Sales intelligence platform for meeting preparation, post-meeting insights, and deal tracking with MEDDPICC framework. Features CRM synchronization, meeting bot management, and multi-source integrations.

projects.title: SustainFoodIQ
projects.description: Food supply chain sustainability platform leveraging AI to optimize waste management. Features multi-tier supplier sustainability scoring, cascading recalculation pipeline, and aggressive caching strategies.

projects.title: Farming Management System
projects.description: Full-stack application for controlled environment farming operations, integrating IoT sensors for comprehensive data collection and farm management.

projects.title: Literature Review Platform
projects.description: System for scientific literature review with automated article fetching, indexing, and collaboration tools for researchers.

projects.title: Real-time Collaborative Editor
projects.description: Node.js-backed collaborative document editor with commenting and suggesting system for pharmaceutical research.

projects.title: Darknet Search Engine
projects.description: GraphQL services for web search, image search, and reverse image search for Kerala Police Cyberdome.

projects.title: Screenshot to Code
projects.description: Combined CNN and LSTM model for converting UI screenshots to HTML/CSS code, automating frontend development.

projects.title: Natural Language QA System
projects.description: Question answering system trained on SQuAD and MARCO datasets, ranked in top 100 performers.
